popularStory.headline: Queen Isabella (She Wolf of France)
popularStory.description: Isabella of France (1295 – 22 August 1358), sometimes described as the She-wolf of France, was Queen of England as the wife of Edward II. She was the youngest surviving child and only surviving daught …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella of France Queen of England於1292年3月17日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，她的父親Philip IV Roi de France23歲，母親Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France19歲。她於1307年11月22日與Edward II King of England在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年8月22日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾賀特福德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella of France Queen of England于1292年3月17日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，她的父亲Philip IV Roi de France23岁，母亲Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France19岁。她于1307年11月22日与Edward II King of England在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年8月22日在英国英格兰賀特福爾賀特福德享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella of France Queen of England was born on 17 March 1292, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, her father, Philip IV Roi de France, was 23 and her mother, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, was 19. She married Edward II King of England on 22 November 1307, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 August 1358, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella of France Queen of England est née le 17 mars 1292, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Philip IV Roi de France, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Edward II King of England le 22 novembre 1307, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1358, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella of France Queen of England am 17. März 1292 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip IV Roi de France 23 und ihre Mutter Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France 19. Sie hat am 22. November 1307 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Edward II King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. August 1358 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of France Queen of England è nata il il 17 marzo 1292 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Philip IV Roi de France, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Edward II King of England il 22 novembre 1307, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1358, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella of France Queen of Englandが1292年3月17日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Philip IV Roi de Franceは23歳，母Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de Franceは19歳であった。1307年11月22日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーでEdward II King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1358年8月22日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 처르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella of France Queen of England(이)가 1292년 3월 17일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip IV Roi de France(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1307년 11월 22일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 Edward II King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 처르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

pt.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of France Queen of England nasceu em 17 de março de 1292, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Philip IV Roi de France, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward II King of England em 22 de novembro de 1307, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1358, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella of France Queen of England родилась 17 марта 1292 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Philip IV Roi de France было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward II King of England 22 ноября 1307 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 августа 1358 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Grey Friars' Church, Newgate, London, En: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella of France Queen of England nació el 17 de marzo de 1292, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philip IV Roi de France, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Edward II King of England el 22 de noviembre de 1307, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1358, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
